DECLARATION OF STUART CLARK IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRERS TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HERRMANN, BJOERN LASSE DOGRULTAN, ERTAN STARTUP COMPASS, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS BJOERN HERRMANN, ERTAN DOGRULTAN, STARTUP COMPASS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART. OVERRULED AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF HAS PROPERLY ALLEGED THAT DEFENDANTS USED THEIR MAJORITY OF SHARES TO INJURY PLAINTIFF. OVERRULED AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF HAS PROPERLY ALLEGED A RIGHT TO POSSESS NET PROFITS FROM THE CORPORATION. OVERRULED AS TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF PLED FACTS WITH SUFFICIENT PARTICULARITY. SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED LEAVE TO AMEND, IF HE CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH, TO ALLEGE WHAT MONIES OR PROPERTY DEFENDANTS OBTAINED FROM PLAINTIFF THROUGH THE USE OF AN UNFAIR BUSINESS PRACTICE. OVERRULED AS TO THE FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION, DEMURRER SERVES NO USEFUL PURPOSE. SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED LEAVE TO AMEND, IF HE CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH, TO ALLEGE A PROSPECTIVE CONTROVERSY THAT WILL NOT BE RESOLVED BY ANOTHER CAUSE OF ACTION. OVERRULED AS TO THE SEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION, THE DEMURRER SERVES NO USEFUL PURPOSE. OVERRULED AS TO THE NINTH CAUSE OF ACTION, THE DEMURRER SERVES NO USEFUL PURPOSE. SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE ELEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED LEAVE TO AMEND, IF HE CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH, TO ALLEGE THE CAUSE OF ACTION AGAINST HIS EMPLOYER. OVERRULED AS TO THE FOURTEENTH CAUSE OF ACTION, THE DEMURRER SERVES NO USEFUL PURPOSE. SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 8TH AND 15TH CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF WAS GIVEN 20 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2013 Continued To Jan-15-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-25-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MICHAEL GREATHOWE, TEL. NO. (925) 463-7073 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. STUART C. CLARK OF CARR/FERRELL LLP, TEL. NO. (650) 812-3415 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS BJOERN HERRMANN, ERTAN DOGRULTAN, STARTUP COMPASS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained in part. Overruled as to the first cause of action, Plaintiff has properly alleged that Defendants used their majority of shares to injury Plaintiff. Overruled as to the second cause of action, Plaintiff has properly alleged a right to possess net profits from the corporation. Overruled as to the third cause of action, Plaintiff pled facts with sufficient particularity. Sustained with leave to amend as to the fourth cause of action, Plaintiff is granted leave to amend, if he can do so in good faith, to allege what monies or property Defendants obtained from Plaintiff through the use of an unfair business practice. Overruled as to the fifth cause of action, demurrer serves no useful purpose. Sustained with leave to amend as to the sixth cause of action, Plaintiff is granted leave to amend, if he can do so in good faith, to allege a prospective controversy that will not be resolved by another cause of action. Overruled as to the seventh cause of action, the demurrer serves no useful purpose. Overruled as to the ninth cause of action, the demurrer serves no useful purpose. Sustained with leave to amend as to the eleventh cause of action, Plaintiff is granted leave to amend, if he can do so in good faith, to allege the cause of action against his employer. Overruled as to the fourteenth cause of action, the demurrer serves no useful purpose. Sustained with leave to amend as to the 8th and 15th cause of action. Plaintiff was given 20 days leave to amend. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/LCN)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-28-2013 Continued To Sep-25-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS BJOERN HERRMANN, ERTAN DOGRULTAN and STARTUP COMPASS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued on the Court's own motion to September 25, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
